items.title: 🔓 [Williams Lake Tribune] Structure fire north of Williams Lake near Deep Creek
items.content_html: ## Structure fire north of Williams Lake near Deep Creek Published 1:50 pm Monday, June 22, 2026 **By Staff Williams Lake Tribune** (Pearly May/Facebook photo) (Pearly May/Facebook photo) The Wildwood Volunteer Fire Department was on the scene of a structure fire north of Williams Lake late Monday morning June 22. Providing mutual assistance was the Williams Lake Fire Department with a tender, engine and a dozen members attending the scene near Xat’sull First Nation’s Deep Creek community by the Esso gas station on Kragbak Road. ## Cariboo, northern B.C. under severe thunderstorm watch Published 7:30 pm Friday, June 19, 2026 **By Jen Zielinski** Region under a severe thunderstorm watch. (Environment Canada) Region under a severe thunderstorm watch. (Environment Canada) Environment Canada is issuing a severe thunderstorm watch for the Cariboo region north of Quesnel. ") Canada Post in Prince George | My PG Now.com staff Business 1 min.read # Signed, sealed and delivered: Canada Post and CUPW sign off Kate Brown By Kate Brown June 18, 2026 FacebookXReddItWhatsAppEmail Canada Post and the Canadian Union of Postal Workers have signed new collective agreements, ending the bargaining process and providing labour stability through January, 2029. For Canadians, the agreements reduce the likelihood of labour disruptions over the next several years, helping ensure reliable mail and parcel delivery. The deals also support plans for weekend delivery service, which
